# InputAddon

An addon element that attaches to the left or right side of an Input, typically used to display static text like currency symbols, URLs, or units.

## Import

```jsx
import { InputAddon } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `placement` | `"left" \| "right"` | - | Which side of the input the addon attaches to |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | The addon content (text, icon, etc.) |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Left addon

```jsx
import { Group } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

<Group attached>
  <InputAddon placement="left">https://</InputAddon>
  <Input placeholder="www.example.com" />
</Group>
```

### Right addon

```jsx
<Group attached>
  <Input placeholder="Amount" />
  <InputAddon placement="right">.00</InputAddon>
</Group>
```

### Both sides

```jsx
<Group attached>
  <InputAddon placement="left">$</InputAddon>
  <Input placeholder="0.00" />
  <InputAddon placement="right">USD</InputAddon>
</Group>
```

### With Field wrapper

```jsx
<Field label="Website">
  <Group attached>
    <InputAddon placement="left">https://</InputAddon>
    <Input placeholder="example.com" />
  </Group>
</Field>
```

## Features

- Renders a visually attached label/addon adjacent to the input
- Supports left and right placement
- Typically used within a `Group` with `attached` prop for seamless borders
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
